title: Control of the Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s Uranium Stockpiles Were Sticking Points
summary_full: The U.S. had demanded that Iran immediately reopen the strait to all maritime traffic, but Iran said it would do so only after a final peace deal, according to Iranian officials.
summary_public: The U.S. had demanded that Iran immediately reopen the strait to all maritime traffic, but Iran said it would do so only after a final peace deal, according to Iranian officials.

IR.label: negative
